DEVOTED-STRIKE_DEVOTED.title: Strike
DEVOTED-DEFEND_DEVOTED.title: Defend
DEVOTED-WOUND_CARE.title: Wound Care
DEVOTED-TEST_OF_FAITH.title: Test Of Faith
DEVOTED-DIVINE_HYMN.description:
Gain 5 [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain additional block equal to all [gold]Faith[/gold].
DEVOTED-DIVINE_HYMN.title: Divine Hymn
DEVOTED-RITUALISTIC_STRIKE.title: Ritualistic Strike
DEVOTED-FAITHFUL_DEFEND.title: Faithful Defend
DEVOTED-FLAGELLATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each Attack already played this turn.
Gain {PenanceRagePower:diff()} [gold]Penance: Rage[/gold] for each Attack already played this turn.{InCombat:\n(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
DEVOTED-FLAGELLATION.title: Flagellation
DEVOTED-ATONEMENT.description: When a [gold]Penance[/gold] effect triggers, heal 2 HP.
DEVOTED-ATONEMENT.title: Atonement
DEVOTED-JUDGEMENT.title: Judgement
DEVOTED-CONVICTION.title: Conviction
DEVOTED-FANATIC_STRIKE.title: Fanatic Strike
DEVOTED-ZEALOUS_STRIKE.title: Zealous Strike
DEVOTED-GUIDING_LIGHT.title: Guiding Light
DEVOTED-MELTING_FORM.title: Melting Form
DEVOTED-RETRIBUTION.title: Retribution
DEVOTED-RIGHTEOUS_DEFENSE.title: Righteous Defense
DEVOTED-TEARS_OF_THE_FLAME.description:
Gain {PenanceEnergyPower:diff()} [gold]Penance: Energy[/gold].
Take {HpLoss:diff()} Damage.
Trigger all of your [gold]Penance[/gold] effects.
DEVOTED-TEARS_OF_THE_FLAME.title: Tears Of The Flame
DEVOTED-LASHING.title: Lashing
DEVOTED-MORTIFICATION.description:
Take {Damage:diff()} Damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Trigger all of your [gold]Penance[/gold] effects.
DEVOTED-MORTIFICATION.title: Mortification
DEVOTED-VOTIVE_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage 3 times.
For the next two turns when playing a card that is a Strike; Add one [gold]Replay[/gold] to the played card, else take 5 damage.
DEVOTED-VOTIVE_STRIKE.title: Votive Strike
DEVOTED-VOW_OF_MIGHT.description:
Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold].
For the next two turns when playing a card that is an attack; Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold], else lose 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
DEVOTED-VOW_OF_MIGHT.title: Vow Of Might
DEVOTED-VOW_OF_PEACE.description:
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
For the next two turns when playing a card that is a skill; Gain 5 [gold]Block[/gold], else lose 1 [gold]Zeal[/gold].
DEVOTED-VOW_OF_PEACE.title: Vow Of Peace
DEVOTED-CANDLE_LIGHT.title: Candle Light
DEVOTED-CONTEMPLATION.description:
Draw cards equal to your current [gold]Faith[/gold].
Gain {DevotionPower:diff()} [gold]Devotion[/gold].
Lose {ZealPower:diff()} [gold]Zeal[/gold].
DEVOTED-CONTEMPLATION.title: Contemplation
DEVOTED-CRUSADE.description: Cards containing “Strike” deal {CrusadePower:diff()} additional damage and trigger all your [gold]Penance[/gold] effects when played.
DEVOTED-CRUSADE.title: Crusade
DEVOTED-DIVINE_STRIKE.title: Divine Strike
DEVOTED-SERENITY_INNER_WRATH.description: If you played 3 or less cards this turn, gain {SerenityZealotryPower:diff()} [gold]Zeal[/gold] and lose {SerenityZealotryPower:diff()} [gold]Devotion[/gold].
DEVOTED-SERENITY_INNER_WRATH.title: Serenity: Inner Wrath
DEVOTED-SERENITY_FORESIGHT.description: If you played 3 or less cards this turn, draw {SerenityDrawPower:diff()} additional card next turn.
DEVOTED-SERENITY_FORESIGHT.title: Serenity: Foresight
DEVOTED-SERENITY_PROTECTION.description: If you played 3 or less cards this turn, gain {SerenityBlockPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
DEVOTED-SERENITY_PROTECTION.title: Serenity: Protection
DEVOTED-SERENITY_FAITH.description: If you played 3 or less cards this turn, gain {SerenityFaithPower:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
DEVOTED-SERENITY_FAITH.title: Serenity: Faith
DEVOTED-SERENITY_CHILDREN_LAUGHTER.descr: If you played 3 or less cards this turn, apply {SerenityVulnPower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerability[/gold] to a random enemy.
DEVOTED-SERENITY_CHILDREN_LAUGHTER.title: Serenity: Children Laughter
DEVOTED-SERENITY_CALM_MIND.description: At the start of your turn, add a random “Serenity” card into your hand.
DEVOTED-SERENITY_CALM_MIND.title: Serenity: Calm Mind
DEVOTED-BREATHING_EXERCISE.title: Breathing Exercise
DEVOTED-PRAYING.title: Praying
DEVOTED-CONFESSION.description:
Take 1 Damage.
Gain {FaithGain:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold].
Trigger all of your [gold]Penance[/gold] effects.
DEVOTED-CONFESSION.title: Confession
DEVOTED-FLAMES_OF_PURIFICATION.descripti:
Take {HpLoss:diff()} Damage.
Gain {PenanceRetributionPower:diff()} [gold]Penance: Retribution[/gold].
Trigger all of your [gold]Penance[/gold] effects.
DEVOTED-FLAMES_OF_PURIFICATION.title: Flames Of Purification
DEVOTED-RETALIATION.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Gain {PenanceRetributionPower:diff()} [gold]Penance: Retribution[/gold].
DEVOTED-RETALIATION.title: Retaliation
DEVOTED-SANCTIFICATION.description:
Remove all [gold]Zeal[/gold] and [gold]Vigor[/gold].
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {FaithPower:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold] X+{Triggers:diff()} times, where X is the amount of [gold]Zeal[/gold] and [gold]Vigor[/gold] lost.
DEVOTED-SANCTIFICATION.title: Sanctification
DEVOTED-LITANY.title: Litany
DEVOTED-WELL_OF_FAITH.description:
Remove all [gold]Faith[/gold].
Gain {FaithPower:diff()} [gold]Faith[/gold] X+{Triggers:diff()} times, where X is the amount of [gold]Faith[/gold] lost.
DEVOTED-WELL_OF_FAITH.title: Well Of Faith
DEVOTED-CRUSHING_UNDER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Gain {PenanceWaxedPower:diff()} [gold]Penance: Waxy[/gold]
DEVOTED-CRUSHING_UNDER.title: Crushing Under
DEVOTED-SANCTIFIED_BLOW.title: Sanctified Blow
DEVOTED-FRANTIC_STRIKE.title: Frantic Strike
DEVOTED-DIVINE_STRENGTH.title: Divine Strength
